description: Semi-realistic top-down shoot-em-up player ship, advanced move set: boost, charge, barrel-roll, transform. Proportion affects hull/cockpit detail density, not humanoid motion.

states.name: boost
states.action: Speed boost: a forward thruster surge shown through an attached engine-glow intensification and a slight forward lean of the hull. Proportion-appropriate design density for semi-realistic build: balanced hull detail with realistic paneling and moderate greebling.
requirements: Any engine-glow intensification must be attached to and overlapping the ship silhouette, staying inside the same frame slot.
Do not draw detached exhaust trails, speed lines, or motion blur.
Proportion-appropriate design density for semi-realistic build: balanced hull detail with realistic paneling and moderate greebling.

states.name: charge
states.action: Weapon charge-up: a building attached glow at the weapon mount, ending on a held bright final frame. Proportion-appropriate design density for semi-realistic build: balanced hull detail with realistic paneling and moderate greebling.
requirements: The final frame must be a stable, held bright charge-complete state, not mid-motion.
Any charge glow must be attached to and overlapping the ship silhouette, staying inside the same frame slot.
Do not draw detached particle bursts or floating glow effects.
Proportion-appropriate design density for semi-realistic build: balanced hull detail with realistic paneling and moderate greebling.

states.name: barrel-roll
states.action: Barrel roll: a full rotation of the ship silhouette around its forward axis, viewed from above. Proportion-appropriate design density for semi-realistic build: balanced hull detail with realistic paneling and moderate greebling.
requirements: Show a complete rotation across the frames, starting and ending near the level-flight silhouette.
Do not draw motion blur, trails, or background scenery.
Proportion-appropriate design density for semi-realistic build: balanced hull detail with realistic paneling and moderate greebling.

states.name: transform
states.action: Transformation sequence: the ship reconfigures through intermediate silhouette poses to a held final form. Proportion-appropriate design density for semi-realistic build: balanced hull detail with realistic paneling and moderate greebling.
requirements: The final frame must be a stable, held transformed end state, not mid-motion.
Show the reconfiguration through silhouette changes only; do not draw detached mechanical effects or particle bursts.
Proportion-appropriate design density for semi-realistic build: balanced hull detail with realistic paneling and moderate greebling.
